productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Snova Sequence Black Uni Red Shoe
description: shoes THAT MAKE YOU WANT TO RUNHighly recommended for moderate overpronators, the adidas Supernova Sequence 3 range of shoes are great looking stability running shoes. This updated version of the Supernova Sequence of adidas may not be very fancy, but it comes with a more flexible upper and outsole, which enhances gait and stability when on the run.Better flexing for better transitionWith a lot of arch support, the Adidas Supernova Sequence 3 has a redesigned forefoot with AdiPRENE technology and different flex points for better transition, which is especially helpful for overpronators. Pronation of the foot means its rotation movement and the way the body distributes weight during movement. In neutral pronators, the weight of the body and shock created during impact with the surface on movement are evenly distributed along the feet, protecting the legs from injuries. However, in overpronators, the lateral (outside) part of the heel strikes the ground first. When such individuals transfer weight from the heel to the metatarsal region, the feet end up rolling too far to the medial on inside arch of the foot, forcing the knees to buckle slightly inwards. This results in uneven distribution of shock and the ankles roll inwards, which could lead to serious leg injuries.In fact, if you study the shoes of overpronators, you will find that the inside arch area of the shoe towards the toe region wears away faster than the rest of the outsole. Hence, it is of prime importance that overpronators choose shoes that have excellent snug Fit and insoles and arches made of strong, durable material. The Adidas Supernova Sequence 3 range of shoes are replete with such an inside support area to support the weight when the runner lands on the lateral side of the foot and then rolls inwards. It has a strong impact guidance system which ensures that the weight is equally distributed along the strong points of the foot, and protects it from injuries.Stable and agileConsidered as one of the best Stability running Shoes from the house of Adidas, the Supernova Sequence 3 has updated and improved flex in the upper and outsole. The forefoot region has been redesigned with AdiPRENE technology, a cushioning material added to the heel that absorbs impact and provides superior cushioning and protection. There are also improvements made in the various flexpoints to enhance easy movement and better transition of the feet. The stitched micro-suede upper of the shoe ensures a smooth forefoot fit that further enhances the natural movement and curving of the foot.The Adidas Supernova Sequence 3 range of shoes is engineered with memory foam heel and padded tongue, along with non-slip lining to lock the ankle in place and prevent it from slipping and getting blistered. These shoes are fitted with anti-microbial sockliners to keep the feet dry and healthy, allowing you to concentrate on your run rather than worry about sweaty, uncomfortable feet.With a Pro Moderator medial support device fitted into the shoe, the midsole of the Adidas Supernova Sequence 3 shoe is built with a Torsion system that supports the midfoot, without forcing the rearfoot to move excessively. With such lightweight arch support coming in a great package, the Adidas Supernova Sequence 3 shoes are highly recommended for moderate overpronators with normal arches for that ultimate stability during long runs.Wash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine wash
